question.text: In India, equity and index options traded on NSE and BSE are of which style?

answer.text: European style - can be exercised only on the expiry date
American style - can be exercised any time before expiry
Index options are European and stock options are American
Stock options are European and index options are American

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** In India, ALL exchange-traded options (both index and stock) follow the EUROPEAN style. They can only be exercised on the expiry date.
**The Trap:** Many students assume stock options are American style because globally some markets offer American-style stock options. In India, everything is European.
**Cross-Exam Context:** This is a high-frequency exam question. SEBI mandates European-style for all exchange-traded options in India.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** India = ALL European style options (index AND stock). No American style options on Indian exchanges.
